Author: meowmeowmeowie1
Name: MyTweak
Punchline: Job rotation toggles + KBM press mirror.
Description: Job rotation toggles and a keyboard/mouse action-press mirror. Includes a master kill-switch (/mytweak disable) and a floating status overlay showing MyTweak ON/DISABLED and Burst ARMED/HELD for the current job. Click the overlay lines to toggle.
Changelog: v1.0.5.11: fix the Next Action tracker getting stuck — it now resolves the next action through the full combo chain (like a real button press) instead of only the first target-typed combo, so it updates live with procs/combo steps. v1.0.5.10: fix mirror landing on the wrong slot under Performance Mode (pulses the pressed button's copies). v1.0.5.9: remove the old on-screen status overlay. v1.0.5.8: Dancer dance-step presses mirror under Performance Mode.
